wiki.summary: “wrist” showcases Ken Carson rap abilities, as he raps about topics such as jewelry, designer clothes, and drugs, while switching his flow multiple times. The instrumental, courtesy of frequent collaborator Lil 88, consists of a almost hypnotic sounding pluck, while hard-hitting bass and fast drums set the mood. On January 19, 2026, “wrist” would be be previewed by Luka Sabbat on Instagram live. Three days later, Ken also previewed the track on his alternate Instagram. Read more on Last.fm.
